title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Carrier India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
